lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh nirbhau niravair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhan gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਵਾਰਾਂ ਤੇ ਵਧੀਕ ॥ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok vaaraan te vadheek | mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Saloks In Addition To The Vaars. First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਤੰਗੀ ਪੈਓਹਰੀ ਗਹਿਰੀ ਗੰਭੀਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: autangee paioharee gahiree ganbheeree |
lines.english: O you with swollen breasts, let your consciousness become deep and profound.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਚੁ ਜਿ ਲਗਾ ਗਿੜਵੜੀ ਸਖੀਏ ਧਉਲਹਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: gach ji lagaa girravarree sakhee dhaulaharee |
lines.english: O sister, those mansions built as high as mountains

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਸੁੜਿ ਸੁਹੀਆ ਕਿਵ ਕਰੀ ਨਿਵਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਥਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sasurr suheea kiv karee nivan na jaae thanee |
lines.english: O mother-in-law, how can I bow? Because of my stiff nipples, I cannot bow.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਭੀ ਢਹਦੇ ਡਿਠੁ ਮੈ ਮੁੰਧ ਨ ਗਰਬੁ ਥਣੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: se bhee dtahade dditth mai mundh na garab thanee |1|
lines.english: - I have seen them come crumbling down. O bride, do not be so proud of your nipples. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਮੁੰਧੇ ਹਰਣਾਖੀਏ ਗੂੜਾ ਵੈਣੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sun mundhe haranaakhee goorraa vain apaar |
lines.english: O bride with deer-like eyes, listen to the words of deep and infinite wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੋਹੀ ਦਿਚੈ ਦੁਰਜਨਾ ਮਿਤ੍ਰਾਂ ਕੂੰ ਜੈਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dohee dichai durajanaa mitraan koon jaikaar |
lines.english: Proclaim that you will not associate with evil people; celebrate victory with your friends.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਹਿਲਾ ਵਸਤੁ ਸਿਞਾਣਿ ਕੈ ਤਾਂ ਕੀਚੈ ਵਾਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: pahilaa vasat siyaan kai taan keechai vaapaar |
lines.english: First, examine the merchandise, and then, make the deal.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਦੋਹੀ ਸਜਣ ਮਿਲਨਿ ਲਹੁ ਮੁੰਧੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: jit dohee sajan milan lahu mundhe veechaar |
lines.english: This proclamation, to meet with your friends, O bride - give it some thought.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਸਜਣਾ ਐਸਾ ਹਸਣੁ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tan man deejai sajanaa aisaa hasan saar |
lines.english: Surrender mind and body to the Lord your Friend; this is the most excellent pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਸਉ ਨੇਹੁ ਨ ਕੀਚਈ ਜਿ ਦਿਸੈ ਚਲਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis sau nehu na keechee ji disai chalanahaar |
lines.english: Do not fall in love with one who is destined to leave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਇਵ ਕਰਿ ਬੁਝਿਆ ਤਿਨੑਾ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak jinaee iv kar bujhiaa tinaa vittahu kurabaan |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to those who understand this. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਹੂ ਖਰੇ ਸੁਜਾਣ ਵੰਞਾ ਏਨੑੀ ਕਪਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: taahoo khare sujaan vanyaa enaee kaparee |3|
lines.english: Those who have survived these treacherous waves are very wise. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਤੂੰ ਤਾਰੂ ਪਾਣਿ ਤਾਹੂ ਪੁਛੁ ਤਿੜੰਨੑ ਕਲ ॥
lines.translit: je toon taaroo paan taahoo puchh tirrana kal |
lines.english: If you wish to swim across the water, then consult those who know how to swim.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੜ ਝਖੜ ਓਹਾੜ ਲਹਰੀ ਵਹਨਿ ਲਖੇਸਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jharr jhakharr ohaarr laharee vehan lakhesaree |
lines.english: The storm rages and the rain floods the land; thousands of waves rise and surge.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸਿਉ ਆਲਾਇ ਬੇੜੇ ਡੁਬਣਿ ਨਾਹਿ ਭਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: satigur siau aalaae berre dduban naeh bhau |4|
lines.english: If you cry out for help from the True Guru, you have nothing to fear - your boat will not sink. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਕੈਸੀ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naanak duneea kaisee hoee |
lines.english: O Nanak, what has happened to the world?

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਨੀਆ ਕਾਰਣਿ ਦੀਨੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: duneea kaaran deen gavaaeaa |5|
lines.english: For the sake of the world, people have lost their faith. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਬੰਧੀ ਹੇਤੁ ਚੁਕਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee bandhee het chukaaeaa |
lines.english: There is no love, even among brothers and relatives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਲਕੁ ਮਿਤੁ ਨ ਰਹਿਓ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: saalak mit na rahio koee |
lines.english: There is no guide or friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਹੈ ਕਰਿ ਕੈ ਓਹਿ ਕਰੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: hai hai kar kai ohi karen |
lines.english: They cry and weep and wail.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਲੑਾ ਪਿਟਨਿ ਸਿਰੁ ਖੋਹੇਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: galaa pittan sir khohen |
lines.english: They slap their faces and pull their hair out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਉ ਲੈਨਿ ਅਰੁ ਕਰਨਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: naau lain ar karan samaae |
lines.english: But if they chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord, they shall be absorbed into it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: naanak tin balihaarai jaae |6|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am a sacrifice to them. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਛੈ ਬਾਘੁ ਡਰਾਵਣੋ ਆਗੈ ਅਗਨਿ ਤਲਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paachhai baagh ddaraavano aagai agan talaau |
lines.english: The terrible tiger is behind you, and the pool of fire is ahead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਡੀਗਿ ਨ ਡੋਲੀਐ ਸੀਧੈ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਧਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: re man ddeeg na ddoleeai seedhai maarag dhaau |
lines.english: O my mind, do not waver or walk on the crooked path; take the straight and true path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸੈ ਜੀਅਰਾ ਪਰਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਮਾ ਕਉ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਢੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: sahasai jeearaa par rahio maa kau avar na dtang |
lines.english: My soul is skeptical and doubtful, but I cannot see any other way to go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਛੁਟੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਸਿਉ ਸੰਗੁ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh chhutteeai har preetam siau sang |7|
lines.english: O Nanak, as Gurmukh, dwell with your Beloved Lord, and you shall be saved. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਮਰਣਾ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap pachhaanai har milai bahurr na maranaa hoe |
lines.english: One who understands himself, meets with the Lord, and never dies again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਘੁ ਮਰੈ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰੀਐ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਦੀਖਿਆ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: baagh marai man maareeai jis satigur deekhiaa hoe |
lines.english: The tiger is killed, and the mind is killed, through the Teachings of the True Guru.
